This plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and relieve cold and flu symptoms. The bioactive constituents of Trachymene odorata include essential oils, flavonoids, and terpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
